title: Senior Software Engineer - Milkbasket Ventures Solutions - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Milkbasket Ventures Solutions - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Milkbasket Ventures Solutions. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Software Engineer to strengthen our Dhanbad-based team.

About Milkbasket Ventures Solutions:
Milkbasket Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in React

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Professional development and training programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Milkbasket Ventures Solutions!
